title: 2 Recent Earnings Beaters to Consider
text: It is earnings season for many companies, and a few welcoming surprises have emerged as several have successfully beaten estimates.

title: FactSet (FDS) Beats on Q3 Earnings & Revenues, Raises Guidance
text: FactSet (FDS) witnesses earnings and revenue growth driven by improvement in Analytics & Trading and Content & Technology solutions.

title: FactSet Research Systems Falls Into The Buy Zone
text: FactSet Research System NYSE: FDS stock is down more than 6% following the Q3 earnings release on a knee-jerk reaction to the news. The company issued a tepid report and guidance but not the kind of news to cause such a move.

title: FactSet Shares Slide After Projecting 2023 Revenue at Low End of Forecast
text: FactSet shares declined after the company said it expects full-year revenue to be at the low end of its forecast.

title: FactSet Research (FDS) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: FactSet Research (FDS) came out with quarterly earnings of $3.79 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $3.62 per share. This compares to earnings of $3.76 per share a year ago.

title: FactSet (FDS) to Report Q3 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
text: FactSet's (FDS) revenues are likely to increase in the third quarter of 2023 due to organic growth and an increasing client base.

title: Earnings Preview: FactSet Research (FDS) Q3 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: FactSet (FDS) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: 3 Dividend Stocks That Should Pay You the Rest of Your Life
text: Visa's "everyone is a partner" approach to its peers could create new growth avenues. FactSet's high customer retention and subscription model make it a strong compounder for the long haul.
